label: Alert Feed
description: Filterable alert table with severity, entity, timestamp, action buttons, and expandable detail sheet.

0.1.note: WidgetErrorBoundary wraps all widgets via widget-wrapper.tsx line 89

0.4.note: No any types or @ts-ignore. ColumnDef<Alert, unknown> uses unknown (not any). Double-cast 'as unknown as Record<string, unknown>[]' at export config is a type-narrowing bridge, not a type suppression.

0.5.note: No lib/mocks imports in widget file

0.6.note: isLoading passed to TableWidget which renders loading skeleton

0.7.note: emptyMessage="No active alerts — all systems operating normally" passed to TableWidget

0.8.note: error prop passed: isError ? 'Failed to load alerts' : null; onRetry={refetch} wired

0.9.note: No dead code. All imports used. alertsResponse used in dataFreshness.lastUpdated.

1.1.note: All data from useAlertsData(): filteredAlerts, isLoading, isError, refetch, counts, mutation fns, filter state

1.2.note: AlertsDataProvider reads useGlobalScope() and applies scopeStrategyIds filter

1.3.note: allAlerts memo depends on scope.organizationIds; changing org rerenders widget with updated filteredAlerts

1.4.note: scope.clientIds flows through getStrategyIdsForScope in context; client filter narrows alert.entity matches

1.5.note: scope.strategyIds flows through getStrategyIdsForScope; strategy filter narrows to specific strategy alerts

1.6.note: scopeStrategyIds.length === 0 skips entity filter; empty scope returns full unfiltered alert set

1.7.note: ALERT_EXPORT_COLUMNS imported from lib/config/services/alerts.config — correct location

l1.notes: Most complete widget in the alerts domain. Full filter chain: scope → status/severity/source/search. BatchGuardButton disables mutations in batch mode.
